description: Elijah outruns King Ahab's chariot to Jezreel before fleeing for his life
The southern border of Judah. Elijah leaves his servant here and goes into the wilderness
Elijah rests under a broom tree and is fed by an angel for his 40-day journey
The 'Mountain of God.' Elijah hears the 'still small voice' in a cave
God instructs Elijah to return north through the desert to anoint new kings
